# Phase 6 Problems oracle (Python mpmath cross-check).
# Range integrated: z in [0, 0.95] at 40 dps.  Past z=1 (the
# pole), mpmath.odefun cannot continue; closed-form is sole source.

# u(0.5) and u'(0.5) via mpmath.odefun (BEFORE pole at z=1).
u_at_0_5_py  = 4.004464669003085
up_at_0_5_py = 15.964278048239478

# u(0.95) and u'(0.95) via mpmath.odefun (NEAR pole, BEFORE z=1).
u_at_0_95_py  = 400.0000004464263
up_at_0_95_py = 15999.999964285582
